sub_agent_reviews.summary: Single Scout searched llm-agent, llm-post-training, and ai-safety together. It ranked Coding with Enemy, Agentopia, and When RLHF Fails as top candidates; the first two were local duplicates, so the main agent selected When RLHF Fails.
Main agent read the arXiv PDF, TeX source, repository README, and demo availability before writing the Markdown deep read.
The article explains the transition taxonomy, UP-PPO shaped reward, row-level diagnostics, warning models, tables, figures, and reproducibility boundaries.
The article separates controlled-artifact evidence from frontier-scale claims and calls out small model scale, prompt count, judge, and multi-seed limitations.
The article positions the paper against reward hacking, PPO/DPO/RLHF, uncertainty monitoring, and LLM-as-judge literature using the paper references.
The Markdown uses bullet-heavy sections, tables, formulas, pseudocode, Mermaid, and four localized figure assets.
